value: v1.12.1 shipping now on 2026-04-16 — HIGH-severity export/import integrity fixes (#74 auto-backup project scope, #75 encrypted roundtrip protection). Release commit 6cd751f pending tag push via `cclid run rel`. Next: consolidated v1.12.2 covering #76-80 (MEDIUM + LOW from the 2026-04-09 audit, folded from original .2/.3 split because v1.12.0 felt thin and a single patch ships cleaner than a three-patch chain). See project.v112patches for sequencing. Milestone v1.12.3 closed; #79 and #80 re-milestoned to v1.12.2.
